use sqlx::PgPool;

struct NewUser {
    name: String,
    email: String,
}

async fn bulk_insert_users(pool: &PgPool, users: &[NewUser]) -> Result<(), sqlx::Error> {
    for user in users {
        // BAD: transaction begin/commit per row
        let mut tx = pool.begin().await?;
        sqlx::query("INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ($1, $2)")
            .bind(&user.name)
            .bind(&user.email)
            .execute(&mut *tx)
            .await?;
        tx.commit().await?;
    }
    Ok(())
}
